```{r}
library(pacman)
p_load(rtracklayer, GenomicRanges, dplyr, data.table, DESeq2, ggplot2, ggrepel, tidyr, 
      readxl, biomaRt, clusterProfiler, org.Hs.eg.db, DT, ChIPseeker, TxDb.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38.knownGene, 
      pheatmap, flashClust, ggraph, ComplexHeatmap, gridExtra, grid, tidygraph, edgeR)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.width=6, fig.height=6, echo = T)
source("~/NB_lncRNA/code/BioInsights/more_code.R")
```
```{r}
tmp <-  readRDS("~/NB_lncRNA/output/code/lncRNA/DataQC/data2DEG.RDS")
sampleInfo <- tmp[[2]]
samples2do <- c("T1N1","T1N2","K7N1", "K7N2")
sampleInfo <- sampleInfo[Barcode %in% samples2do, ] 
sampleInfo$Group <- sampleInfo$Clone
```
```{r}
DT::datatable(sampleInfo[, .(sample, Clone, Oxygen, Treatment)], class = 'cell-border stripe')
```
```{r}
#lncRNA
duomenys <- readRDS("~/NB_lncRNA/output/code/lncRNA/DataQC/data2DEG.RDS")

list_of_4 <- duomenys[[1]]
counts_lnc <- list_of_4[[2]]
counts_lnc <- counts_lnc[, samples2do]

#Protein coding
duomenys <- readRDS("~/NB_lncRNA/input/data2DEG_protein.RDS")

list_of_4 <- duomenys[[1]]
counts_pc <- list_of_4[[2]]
counts_pc <- counts_pc[, samples2do]
```

# Koreliacija

Didesnis skirtumas tarp klonų matomas mRNR raiškoje
```{r, fig.width = 14}
a <- get_cor(counts_lnc, title = "lncRNA")
b <-get_cor(counts_pc, title = "mRNA")

a | b
```

# PCA

Atsiskyrimas tarp klonų didesnis mRNA raiškos duomenyse
```{r}
log_lnc <- log2(counts_lnc + 1)
log_pc  <- log2(counts_pc + 1)
pca_lnc <- prcomp(t(log_lnc))
pca_pc  <- prcomp(t(log_pc))
```
```{r, fig.width = 15}
a <- getpca(log_lnc, sampleInfo) + ggtitle("PCA lncRNA")
b <- getpca(log_pc, sampleInfo) + ggtitle("PCA mRNA")
a | b
```

# Skaitinis palyginimas
## Efekto dydžio pasiskirstymas
```{r}
clone <- c("TC1", "TC1", "K7","K7")
sep_lnc <- get_dist(log_lnc, clone)
sep_pc  <- get_dist(log_pc, clone)

# Aukštesnis sk. rodo didesnį atsiskyrimą tarp klonų
cat("lncRNA atsiskyrimo tarp klonų: ", sep_lnc$ratio, "\n")
cat("mRNA atsiskyrimo tarp klonų: ", sep_pc$ratio, "\n")
```

Atsiskyrimas tarp klonų pagal mRNA yra stipresnis

## Mediana
```{r}
logFC_lnc <- rowMeans(log_lnc[, clone=="K7", drop=FALSE]) - 
             rowMeans(log_lnc[, clone=="TC1", drop=FALSE])

logFC_pc  <- rowMeans(log_pc[, clone=="K7", drop=FALSE]) - 
             rowMeans(log_pc[, clone=="TC1", drop=FALSE])

cat("Mediana |logFC| (lncRNA):", median(abs(logFC_lnc)), "\n")
cat("Mediana |logFC| (mRNA):  ", median(abs(logFC_pc)), "\n")
```

mRNA rodo ryškesnius klonams būdingus raiškos pokyčius.

```{r, eval=F}
boxplot(abs(logFC_lnc), abs(logFC_pc),
        names=c("lncRNA","mRNA"),
        main="|log2FC| tarp klonų",
        col=c("skyblue","orange"))
```
